explanation: The setMetadata function (line 368–370) provably omits event emission after updating tokenStorage.metadata. All seven other owner-controlled setter functions in the same contract emit dedicated events (DocumentUriSet, TaxConfigSet, DeflationConfigSet, MaxTokenAmountPerSet, AuthorisedSenderSet, WhitelistImplSet, BlacklistImplSet). No MetadataSet event is declared anywhere. No compensating mechanism exists. Off-chain indexers and event-driven UIs will silently miss metadata updates. The defect is real; Low severity is appropriate.
